items.definition_en: A small sea animal with a shell that you can eat.
items.example_en: I love eating shrimp in my salad.

items.definition_en: A sea animal with a hard shell and two large claws.
items.example_en: The crab walked sideways on the sand.

items.definition_en: A large sea animal with a hard shell and big claws.
items.example_en: We ordered lobster for dinner last night.

items.definition_en: A small shellfish that lives in sand or mud.
items.example_en: He found a clam on the beach.

items.definition_en: A small sea animal with a dark shell.
items.example_en: They cooked mussel soup for lunch.

items.definition_en: A sea animal with a rough shell, eaten as food.
items.example_en: Oyster is a popular dish in some countries.

items.definition_en: A large fish that people often eat fresh or canned.
items.example_en: Tuna sandwiches are my favorite snack.

items.definition_en: A pink fish that is popular to eat.
items.example_en: Grilled salmon tastes delicious.

items.definition_en: A white fish that is often used for fish and chips.
items.example_en: He ordered cod with fries at the restaurant.

items.definition_en: A small fish eaten fresh, smoked, or preserved.
items.example_en: Herring is common in European cuisine.

items.definition_en: A small, salty fish often used on pizza.
items.example_en: Some people like anchovy on their pizza.

items.definition_en: A small silver fish that is often canned.
items.example_en: We had sardine sandwiches for lunch.

items.definition_en: A sea animal with eight arms.
items.example_en: Octopus is a special dish in some places.

items.definition_en: A soft sea animal with ten arms.
items.example_en: Fried squid is a tasty seafood snack.

items.definition_en: A shellfish with a fan-shaped shell.
items.example_en: She tried scallop for the first time yesterday.

items.definition_en: A long, snake-like fish.
items.example_en: Smoked eel is popular in some countries.

items.definition_en: A mild white fish often used in cooking.
items.example_en: Tilapia is an easy fish to cook.

items.definition_en: A popular white fish found in saltwater.
items.example_en: They served grilled sea bass at the party.

items.definition_en: A large flat fish used for food.
items.example_en: Halibut steaks are thick and white.

items.definition_en: Fried squid rings served as food.
items.example_en: Calamari is my favorite appetizer.
